productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Style NoteThe manually treated denim with its heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from united colors of benetton, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers.Product DetailsWashed blue jeans, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waistband with belt loops with a metal button and zipped closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fit; Regular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
